svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(227, 242, 253), rgb(20, 33, 42)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(66, 165, 245), rgb(36, 121, 190));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 998px; height: 1px; padding-top: 12px; margin-left: 1px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
